title: alangium javanicum var. meyeri
intro: Alangium javanicum var. meyeri, also known as the 'Kadukkai' or 'Guduguda', is a plant species that belongs to the family Alangiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Alangium javanicum var. meyeri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant properties that help protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in traditional medicine to make teas, decoctions, and infusions that are used to treat various ailments.
